input_text: The teacher showed the students the map. The dog chased by the boy was black. The letter was written in June. Bike's length is 10 kilometers. John's brother has a car. The ball was kicked by Mike. Mary was heard to sing. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. A nice elephant was strong. Apparently, Tom left early. Sheep are afraid of mice. Catholics can not disappear. Anna handed Mark a key. Eve forgot to lock the door. There is a ghost in the room. Tallinn is probably in Estonia. If X1 is not a parent of Y1, Y1 is not a child of X1. John's sister has a car?
